creator: ml-freebsd@bettercom.de
text:
graphics/mapnik is currently marked as broken because it did not build with boost-libs-1.41.

In the meantime boost was updated to 1.43, the current version of mapnik is 0.71 (ports version is 0.61).

graphics/mapnik now builds and works again, broken-tag should be removed after updating ports. I'm not sure whether the freebsd-patch for mapnik is necessary any longer - here mapnik worked without this patch.
